title: PARENT EDUCATION - 211info
text: FAMILY NURTURING CENTER JOSEPHINE COUNTY PARENT EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a way for parents and caregivers to learn discipline strategies and strengthen parent and child interactions. Provide KEEP virtually for kin caregivers, foster parents and bio parents, in-person Life Skills (budgeting, cooking, GED, etc), and Parent to Parent support groups 214 W 4th Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Varies by class Email (541) 779-5242 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 779-5242 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon Services: Adoption and Foster/Kinship Care Support Groups Financial Literacy Training GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction In Person Support Groups * Foster Parents Parent Support Groups * Kinship Caregivers Parent/Child Activity Groups Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - DIAPERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
